name: Dependency Audit on Change
description: Run vulnerability audit when build/dependency files are modified

then.command: echo 'Dependencies modified. Running audit...' && (npx npm-audit --audit-level=high 2>/dev/null || npx audit-ci --high 2>/dev/null || pip-audit 2>/dev/null || poetry audit 2>/dev/null || cargo audit 2>/dev/null || bundler-audit check --update 2>/dev/null || echo 'No audit tool found for this ecosystem. Manual check required.')
